message:
fix(youtube): add C3.4 constraints_cbor to unit test token generation

The generate_valid_token() helper in unit tests was missing CBOR-serialized
CapabilityConstraints, causing test_invoke_without_config and
test_invoke_missing_field to fail with CapabilityDenied instead of reaching
the connector's own validation logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
